title: no matter what
author: outofocus
summary:
Idia remembers the day his words appeared as if it were yesterday. He had just turned eight. Back then, he was still capable of looking forward to things, soulmates included. He and Ortho used to talk about it all the time. What their words might be. How it would feel when they heard them for the first time. Lonely kids cling to dreams like that, and Idia had clung harder than anyone.
That morning he woke up, rolled onto his side, and looked at his wrist. His breath caught in his throat. The letters stood out as if they’d been burned into his skin, sharp and impossible to misread:
You are the most irritating person I’ve had the misfortune of meeting.

title: Where Roses Wither
author: Shatteredgl4ss
warnings: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
summary:
Julia Clover leaves.
She doesn’t attend the trial.She doesn’t say goodbye properly.She doesn’t look back.
Instead, she boards a carriage bound for Maquillaville — the glittering capital of the Shaftlands — where reputation is currency, beauty is power, and weakness is devoured whole.
Accepted into one of the most prestigious all-girls academies in the city — with quiet help from Vil Schoenheit himself — Julia is thrown into a world of couture uniforms, ruthless social hierarchies, and girls raised to rule empires rather than hearts.
At first, she tells herself this is temporary.
A distraction.
A way to escape the courtroom, the whispers, and the memory of a boy who still lingers in every rose garden.
But Maquillaville changes her.
As the trial unfolds far away and Riddle Rosehearts faces truths he cannot outrun, Julia builds something new — a version of herself that doesn’t break under pressure.
But reinvention has a cost.
Because no matter how far she runs, roses still grow in memory.

title: Anomaly | Twisted Wonderland
author: sethcertified
summary:
The mirror didn’t choose you. No magic. No place in Night Raven College.
You are an anomaly in a world built on magic, rules, and hierarchy—and that alone is enough to make you impossible to ignore.
At first, it is curiosity. A magicless outsider who doesn’t behave correctly, who disrupts expectations simply by existing in the wrong spaces. But attention in Night Raven College never stays simple for long.
Soon, you are being watched. Studied. Pulled into the orbit of people who should have never been interested in you at all. Across the school, others begin to notice you too—drawn in by your unpredictability, your defiance, your refusal to fit into any system they understand. What starts as observation turns into fixation, and fixation turns into something far more dangerous: attachment.
They shouldn’t care about you.They shouldn’t think about you.They shouldn’t want you.
But they do.
And the more you disrupt their world, the more they begin to revolve around you—each one of them convinced, in their own way, that you are something meant to be understood… and kept.

Everyone at Night Raven College is convinced Floyd Leech is the reason Riddle Rosehearts looks so stressed lately. He’s constantly interrupting him, ignoring rules, dragging him away mid-duty, and generally being… Floyd. From the outside, it looks like Riddle is one bad day away from snapping again, and Floyd is pushing him there on purpose.
So naturally, people start watching. Closely.

When it’s just the two of them, Floyd shifts. He still teases, but softer. He notices when Riddle is overwhelmed, pulls him away before things get worse, and stays with him until he calms down. It wasn't wrong to be a little greedy sometimes, was it? According to his contract, he was supposed to leave the main building and conduct field research.

“So, is it fun working at a funeral home? It feels a bit cold in here,” he said, trying to make small talk.

Each step sent tremors through the carriage’s frame, a rhythm that seemed almost alive, sensing the heartbeat of its passengers. The door swung open with a sharp, metallic creak, the black maw of the carriage hungrily inviting her in.

summary:
In the polis of Elis, a prince is born beneath the shadow of a prophecy.
Determined to outwit fate, the king removes his fragile heir from the affairs of the city, hoping to keep him far from the dangers foretold by the oracle. Yet fate has never been easily avoided.
When death strikes, the young prince must leave his home to protect his city and escape the destiny waiting for him.
But no thread spun by the Moirai is ever so simple, and Idia’s heart leads him toward a place where even the bravest heroes fear to follow.
A Greek-religion-inspired story where a boy faces his fears, falls in love and grows into a man.
(The title of this work might change in the future. Its current name is there just because I thought it was funny. Updates every sunday!)

title: Cuando el pavorreal escoge al bufón
author: Dragon_Biannco
summary:
Tener un pasado problemático ya era uno de sus problemas, ahora, en el Night Raven College parecía ser su etiqueta imborrable. Reser Gonzaly no se avergüenza de decir que es adoptado junto a su hermana por su madre a quien suele llamar solo por "Zeze", cuando llega a Heartslabyul bajo la elección del Espejo Oscuro las cosas se ponen difíciles entre tantas reglas extrañas bajo aquel "Tirano Carmesí" para alguien con traumas sin curar del todo. Gritos y golpes, un detonante para despertar a su pesadilla infantil.
Aunque el tan estricto Líder Rosehearts consiguió entender que ese chico no era un "Bufón" para el Dormitorio, los demás chicos de la escuela no estaban de acuerdo ¿Qué hizo Reser? ¡Vender té! Sin saber que esa simple acción iba a acercarlo a aquel chico que lo ponía nervioso de solo verlo a lo lejos. Por suerte del destino o casualidad, la oportunidad de quedar en un mismo espacio sucedió sin darle tiempo a aquel rubio de pensar bien en sus acciones inicialmente arrogantes, quedando encantado sin saber cómo de esos iris amielados.
Fuera un milagro o ese brillo dentro del alma calma y atenta del chico de dieciséis años, que Vil Schoenheit comenzó a sonreír de verdad fuera de cámaras.

summary:
Kalim has always been raised to be the perfect son—and he knows he’s succeeded. It isn’t arrogance, just fact. Meeting expectations, no matter the cost, is what he was taught to do. He knows it frustrates others, especially Minajael, who can’t understand how Kalim accepts a life decided for him without resistance. But Kalim has never questioned it. To him, duty comes first. And if that duty means stepping into an engagement—especially with someone from his past—then he’ll take the role without hesitation.
Leona hates the hand he’s been dealt—second son, second choice, always replaceable. And when he isn’t, he’s a mistake. A monster. A problem whispered about behind closed doors. It’s enough to make anyone bitter, and Leona wears it well. But beneath it, he cares—more than he’ll ever admit. He loves his people, and he won’t stand by while they suffer. So when his brother asks him to marry for aid, he agrees. Not for the crown, but to keep them alive.
A rewrite of “This Was Never My Choice, But I’ll Make It Work.” Updates every Monday and Tuesday.

title: Twisted Wonderland reacts to maleficent (Live action)
author: Pochita_Pan_0404
relationships: Malleus Draconia & Silver & Lilia Vanrouge & Sebek Zigvolt
summary:
Throughout all the years of Twisted Wonderland, the Seven Greats were regarded as gods. Not by birth, but by the magnitude of their deeds, by the weight their names carried in history. They were extraordinary beings, elevated by the fear and admiration of entire generations. Figures of power, of beauty, of ruin. But as with all myths, their stories dissolved into interpretations—vague echoes that never touched the truth.
No one knew the details. No one dared to look beyond the veil.
Until, for a reason that defied all logic and known magic, the students of Night Raven College were torn from their reality and confined to a room with no doors, no windows, no escape. A space suspended between time and memory. There, with no option to flee or distract themselves, they were given a single task: to witness the true story of the Thorn Fairy.
Not the legend. Not the tale. The truth.

summary: Trey Clover is known as the most wanted man in the entire queendom, and that’s putting it lightly. He's hot, he's wealthy and he's kind. Unfortunately, as vain as Cater is, he's under no delusion that he has a shot with the Queen's advisor, royal ball or not.Besides, he’s not going to fight the entire queendom for him; that would just be ridiculous.He's going to sit at home, sulk in his own misery and move on with his life.
